Original_Definition: (adv) quite enough. [id] နဒဒှ်မကေတ်ရ၊ နဒဒှ်မဍိုက်ပေၚ်ရ။
(v) to be thoroughly cooked, quite healed.
(adj) quits.
(v) to shake, quake, quiver, rock, be loose in a socket.
(v) to shake, quake, quiver, rock, be loose in a socket. [Der.] ချဳ။

(v) to shake, quake, quiver, rock, be loose in a socket.
